description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential structure with a sprawling, L-shaped floor plan and a low, broad roof. The exterior walls are primarily light-colored, with some sections featuring darker accents and what appear to be window and door frames. The roof is flat and slightly overhanging, with visible entryways and arched porch-like features on one side. Several windows and doors are distributed irregularly along the facade, and the structure appears to have a partially open or unfinished look in some areas. The overall design suggests a modern or contemporary bungalow with practical, straightforward lines and minimal ornamentation.
description: A single-story, L-shaped bungalow with a flat roof, light exterior walls, and multiple windows and doors, featuring arched porch elements and a modern, open layout.
description_view_0: This view shows the main facade with several doorways and windows, and a clear L-shaped layout with light-colored walls.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the side of the bungalow, showing more windows and a continuous flat roof, with some darker accent areas.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals arched entryways and porch-like structures, as well as a more open section of the building.
description_view_3: This perspective emphasizes the arched porch features and the broad, flat roof, with visible entry points and a mix of wall textures.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with scattered windows and grouped entryways
